summary: Live IBJA gold and silver price tracker displaying Gold 24K and Silver rates, with static fallback values (Gold: ₹1,70,000/10g, Silver: ₹3,09,000/kg) and auto-refreshing live updates from the IBJA API.
architectural_notes: Live prices fetched from IBJA API with auto-refresh

existing_features.title: Update the hardcoded fallback gold price in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts to ₹1,70,000 per 10g (Gold 24K).
Update the hardcoded fallback silver price in frontend/src/config/fallback.ts to ₹3,09,000 per kg.
